zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet於1578年4月出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 布拉德利時，他的父親Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham18歲，母親Lady Alice Osborne15歲。他於1604年4月23日與Martha Livesay在英國素瑞斯特亞坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1656年4月在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet于1578年4月出生在英国素福爾可格亞特 布拉德利时，他的父亲Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham18岁，母亲Lady Alice Osborne15岁。他于1604年4月23日与Martha Livesay在英国素瑞斯特亞坦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1656年4月在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet was born in April 1578, in Great Bradley, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham, was 18 and his mother, Lady Alice Osborne, was 15. He married Martha Livesay on 23 April 1604, in Streatham, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1656, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in St Clement Danes, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet est né en avril 1578, à Great Bradley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Osborne, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Martha Livesay le 23 avril 1604, à Streatham, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1656, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à St Clement Danes, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet im April 1578 in Great Bradley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham 18 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Osborne 15. Er hat am 23. April 1604 in Streatham, Surrey, England Martha Livesay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1656 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in St Clement Danes, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet è nato il nel aprile 1578 nel Great Bradley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Osborne, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Martha Livesay il 23 aprile 1604, nel Streatham, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1656, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a St Clement Danes, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronetが1578年4月にイギリススフォルクグレアト ブラドリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Islehamは18歳，母Lady Alice Osborneは15歳であった。1604年4月23日にイギリススリーストレアサムでMartha Livesayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1656年4月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックススト クレメント ダンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet(이)가 1578년 4월 영국 수폴크 그리트 브래들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Osborne(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1604년 4월 23일 영국 수리 스트리섬에서 Martha Livesay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1656년 4월 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스트 클레멘트 단아네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet nasceu em abril de 1578, em Great Bradley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Osborne, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Livesay em 23 de abril de 1604, em Streatham, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1656, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em St Clement Danes, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet родился апрель 1578 г. в местности грит брадли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Osborne, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Livesay 23 апреля 1604 г. в местности стритам, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1656 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ст клемент данесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet nació en abril de 1578, en Great Bradley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Osborne, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Martha Livesay el 23 de abril de 1604, en Streatham, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1656, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en St Clement Danes, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
